headline.en: v4 fee vote is the inflection point; net inflation (+1.96%/yr) remains structural anchor despite 7-day bounce
headline.zh: v4 费用激活投票是拐点；尽管 7 日反弹，净通胀(+1.96%/年)仍是结构性压力

keyChanges.en: Price +15.12% over 7 days ($2.80→$3.23), recovering from local capitulation zone
v4 fee activation proposal now in active voting—potential 30-50% protocol revenue boost if passed
keyChanges.zh: v4 费用激活提案进入投票阶段——若通过，协议收入可能提升 30-50%

keyChanges.en: Net emission still +17.51M UNI/year (+1.96% inflation): burns 2.49M but emits 20M annually at current price
keyChanges.zh: 净增发仍为 +1751 万 UNI/年(+1.96% 通胀)：当前价格下年销毁 249 万但增发 2000 万

contrarianObservation.en: Price is 45% below the DAO's own $5.96 fair value mark (treasury burn anchor), and pathetically low OI ($14.82M) means no one is positioned—if v4 passes, this is a perfect squeeze setup with minimal resistance to $5+
contrarianObservation.zh: 价格较 DAO 自己标记的 $5.96 公允价值(国库销毁锚定价)低 45%，且极低的持仓量($1482 万)意味着无人布局——若 v4 通过，这是完美的逼空设置，向上至 $5+ 阻力极小

watchNext.en: v4 fee activation vote outcome—passage could flip revenue structure and validate $3-4 as accumulation zone
watchNext.zh: v4 费用激活投票结果——通过可能改变收入结构，验证 $3-4 为吸筹区间

watchNext.en: Net inflation breakeven threshold: needs protocol revenue >$64.6M annualized (currently $47.26M, shortfall $17.34M)
watchNext.zh: 净通胀盈亏平衡点：需协议年化收入 >$6460 万(当前 $4726 万，缺口 $1734 万)

watchNext.en: Derivatives OI and volume—current $14.82M OI and $6.39M daily volume signal zero conviction; need >$50M OI for institutional re-entry
watchNext.zh: 衍生品持仓量和成交量——当前 $1482 万 OI 和 $639 万日成交量显示零信念；需 >$5000 万 OI 表明机构重新入场

fullReasoning.en: UNI's 15% weekly bounce from the $2.80 local low looks encouraging on surface, but the structural problem remains: at $3.23, the protocol burns only 2.49M UNI annually while emitting 20M, resulting in net inflation of +1.96%. This $17.34M revenue gap is why the burn narrative hasn't sustained rallies. The price sits 45% below the DAO's own $5.96 burn anchor—an implicit fair value mark from the treasury operation. The active v4 fee activation vote is the critical catalyst. If passed, protocol revenue could jump 30-50%, potentially bringing net inflation closer to neutral and validating current price as a base. TVL growth (+5.33% weekly) and healthy fee generation ($10.46M/7d) suggest underlying protocol strength, but $14.82M derivatives OI and $6.39M daily volume reveal zero institutional conviction. The setup is binary: v4 passes and UNI reprices toward $5-6 on improved unit economics, or it fails and $3 support breaks on continued dilution. Low OI means few are positioned either way—a potential squeeze setup if governance delivers. Treat this as a governance event trade, not a momentum chase.
fullReasoning.zh: UNI 从 $2.80 局部低点的 15% 周反弹表面看起来令人鼓舞，但结构性问题依然存在：在 $3.23 价位，协议每年仅销毁 249 万 UNI，但增发 2000 万，导致净通胀率为 +1.96%。这 $1734 万的收入缺口是销毁叙事无法支撑持续上涨的原因。价格较 DAO 自己的 $5.96 销毁锚定价(国库操作隐含的公允价值标记)低 45%。正在进行的 v4 费用激活投票是关键催化剂。若通过，协议收入可能跃升 30-50%，有望将净通胀拉近中性，验证当前价格为底部区间。TVL 增长(周涨 5.33%)和健康的费用生成($1046 万/7 日)显示协议基本面稳固，但 $1482 万的衍生品持仓量和 $639 万日成交量暴露出机构零信念。设置是二元的：v4 通过则 UNI 因单位经济改善重新定价至 $5-6，失败则 $3 支撑因持续稀释而破位。低持仓量意味着双向布局极少——若治理兑现，这是潜在的逼空设置。将此视为治理事件交易，而非动量追涨。
